message.content:
@startuml
left to right direction
autonumber
skinparam sequenceMessageAlign center

participant "ProcessLifecycleOwnerInitializer" as ProcessLifecycleOwnerInitializer
participant "LifecycleDispatcher" as LifecycleDispatcher
participant "DispatcherActivityCallback" as DispatcherActivityCallback
participant "FragmentCallback" as FragmentCallback
participant "ReportFragment" as ReportFragment

ProcessLifecycleOwnerInitializer -> LifecycleDispatcher : onCreate()
LifecycleDispatcher -> DispatcherActivityCallback : static init()
DispatcherActivityCallback -> FragmentCallback : onActivityCreated
DispatcherActivityCallback -> ReportFragment : onActivityCreated

@enduml
